package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerLoggingOverheadFmtLogMessageInLoop() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_logging_overhead_fmt_log_message_in_loop"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Logging overhead. Flag formatted log strings built inside loops instead of structured lazy fields."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
